data.original_question: What are the alias of the cities with 0 population in 2010?
data.resolved_question: What are the alias of the cities with 0 population in 2010?
data.generated_sql: SELECT alias.alias FROM alias INNER JOIN zip_data ON alias.zip_code = zip_data.zip_code WHERE zip_data.population_2010 = 0;

data.original_question: Among the cities with area code 608, how many cities implement daylight savings?
data.resolved_question: What is the count of cities with area code 608 where the time_zone is 'Daylight Savings' from the zip_data table in the address database?
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT zip_data.city) FROM zip_data INNER JOIN area_code ON zip_data.zip_code = area_code.zip_code WHERE area_code.area_code = 608 AND zip_data.time_zone = 'Daylight Savings'

data.original_question: Provide the average elevation of the cities with alias Amherst.
data.resolved_question: What is the average elevation of the cities in the zip_data table where the alias is 'Amherst'?
data.generated_sql: SELECT AVG(zip_data.elevation) FROM alias JOIN zip_data ON alias.zip_code = zip_data.zip_code WHERE alias.alias = 'Amherst';

data.original_question: What is the country and state of the city named Dalton?
data.resolved_question: What is the country and state of the city named Dalton?
data.generated_sql:
SELECT Country.Name, City.District 
FROM City 
JOIN Country ON City.CountryCode = Country.Code 
WHERE City.Name = 'Dalton'

data.original_question: Give at least five alias of cities with a postal point of post office.
data.resolved_question: What are at least five different aliases (or names) of cities that have a postal point of post office, considering the available databases and their respective tables?
data.generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT city FROM airports LIMIT 5;

data.original_question: What is the difference in the number of cities with P.O. box only and cities with Post Office among the cities with area code 787?
data.resolved_question: What is the difference in the number of cities with P.O. box only and cities with Post Office among the cities with area code 787?
data.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN zip_data.type = 'P.O. Box only' THEN 1 END) 
    - 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN zip_data.type = 'Post Office' THEN 1 END) 
FROM zip_data 
INNER JOIN area_code ON zip_data.zip_code = area_code.zip_code 
WHERE area_code.area_code = 787 
AND zip_data.type IN ('P.O. Box only', 'Post Office')

data.original_question: Among the cities belonging to the country named Arroyo, calculate the percentage of increase in the population in these cities from 2010 to 2020.
data.resolved_question: Among the cities belonging to the country named Arroyo, calculate the percentage of increase in the population in these cities from 2010 to 2020.
data.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN year = 2020 THEN population ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN year = 2010 THEN population ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN year = 2010 THEN population ELSE 0 END) AS percentage_increase
FROM 
    (SELECT 
         co.Name AS country_name, 
         ci.Population, 
         2020 AS year 
     FROM 
         City ci
     JOIN 
         Country co ON ci.CountryCode = co.Code
     WHERE 
         co.Name = 'Arroyo'
     UNION ALL
     SELECT 
         co.Name AS country_name, 
         ci.Population, 
         2010 AS year 
     FROM 
         City ci
     JOIN 
         Country co ON ci.CountryCode = co.Code
     WHERE 
         co.Name = 'Arroyo') AS subquery;

data.original_question: Among the postal points in Texas, provide the zip codes and cities of postal points which have total beneficiaries of above 10000.
data.resolved_question: Among the postal points in Texas, provide the zip codes and cities of postal points which have total beneficiaries of above 10000.
data.generated_sql: SELECT zip_code, city FROM zip_data WHERE state = 'TX' AND total_beneficiaries > 10000;

data.original_question: Among the postal points in the District of Columbia, how many of them have an area with above 20000 black population?
data.resolved_question: What is the count of zip codes in the District of Columbia where the black population in the corresponding area is above 20000?
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM zip_data JOIN state ON zip_data.state = state.abbreviation WHERE state.name = 'District of Columbia' AND black_population > 20000;

data.original_question: Provide the city where zip code 19019 is located and the alias of that city.
data.resolved_question: Provide the city where zip code 19019 is located and the alias of that city.
data.generated_sql: SELECT zip_data.city, alias.alias FROM zip_data INNER JOIN alias ON zip_data.zip_code = alias.zip_code WHERE zip_data.zip_code = '19019'

data.original_question: List the bad alias of the postal point located in Camuy.
data.resolved_question: What are the bad aliases of the postal points located in Camuy?
data.generated_sql: SELECT avoid.bad_alias FROM avoid INNER JOIN zip_data ON avoid.zip_code = zip_data.zip_code WHERE zip_data.city = 'Camuy';

data.original_question: Provide the zip code, city, and congress representative's full names of the area which has highest population in 2020.
data.resolved_question: Provide the zip code, city, and congress representative's full names of the area which has highest population in 2020.
data.generated_sql:
SELECT zip_data.zip_code, zip_data.city, congress.first_name || ' ' || congress.last_name AS full_name
FROM zip_data
JOIN zip_congress ON zip_data.zip_code = zip_congress.zip_code
JOIN congress ON zip_congress.district = congress.cognress_rep_id
WHERE zip_data.population_2020 = (SELECT MAX(population_2020) FROM zip_data)

data.original_question: Among the daylight savings areas in the Midwest region, how many postal points are there in Illinois?
data.resolved_question: Among the daylight savings areas in the Midwest region, how many postal points are there in Illinois?
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(zip_code) FROM zip_data WHERE region = 'Midwest' AND daylight_savings = 'Yes' AND state = 'IL';

data.original_question: Provide the countries and the zip codes in the Virgin Islands.
data.resolved_question: What are the countries and zip codes associated with the Virgin Islands in the mondial_geo database?
data.generated_sql:
SELECT country.Name, city.Name AS zip_code
FROM country
JOIN city ON country.Code = city.CountryCode
WHERE country.Name LIKE '%Virgin Islands%';

data.original_question: Provide the zip codes and the alias of Greeneville.
data.resolved_question: Provide the zip codes and the alias of Greeneville.
data.generated_sql: SELECT zip_code, alias FROM alias WHERE alias = 'Greeneville';

data.original_question: Compare the numbers of postal points under Smith Adrian and Heck Joe.
data.resolved_question: Compare the numbers of postal points under Smith Adrian and Heck Joe.
data.generated_sql: SELECT 'Smith Adrian' AS name, COUNT(*) AS postal_points FROM (SELECT * FROM Mailings1_2 WHERE REFID = 0 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM mailings3 WHERE REFID = 0) UNION ALL SELECT 'Heck Joe' AS name, COUNT(*) AS postal_points FROM (SELECT * FROM Mailings1_2 WHERE REFID = 1 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM mailings3 WHERE REFID = 1)

data.original_question: Provide the zip codes and CBSA officers of the postal point in Oxford.
data.resolved_question: What are the zip codes and CBSA officers associated with the postal point in Oxford, and how can we retrieve this information from the provided databases?
data.generated_sql:
SELECT zip_data.zip_code, congress.first_name, congress.last_name, CBSA.CBSA_name 
FROM zip_data 
JOIN CBSA ON zip_data.CBSA = CBSA.CBSA 
JOIN zip_congress ON zip_data.zip_code = zip_congress.zip_code 
JOIN congress ON zip_congress.district = congress.cognress_rep_id 
WHERE zip_data.city = 'Oxford'

data.original_question: Provide the zip codes and their affiliated organization for the postal point under Kingsport-Bristol, TN-VA.
data.resolved_question: Provide the zip codes and their affiliated organization for the postal point under Kingsport-Bristol, TN-VA.
data.generated_sql:
SELECT zip_data.zip_code, zip_data.organization
FROM zip_data
JOIN CBSA ON zip_data.CBSA = CBSA.CBSA
WHERE CBSA.CBSA_name = 'Kingsport-Bristol, TN-VA';

data.original_question: Provide the zip codes and the congress representatives' names of the postal points which are affiliated with Readers Digest.
data.resolved_question: What are the zip codes and the names of the congress representatives associated with the postal points that are affiliated with Readers Digest?
data.generated_sql: SELECT zip_data.zip_code, congress.first_name, congress.last_name FROM zip_data INNER JOIN zip_congress ON zip_data.zip_code = zip_congress.zip_code INNER JOIN congress ON zip_congress.district = congress.cognress_rep_id WHERE zip_data.organization = 'Readers Digest'

data.original_question: Among the postal points in California, calculate the percentage of them in post office types.
data.resolved_question: Among the postal points in California, calculate the percentage of them in post office types.
data.generated_sql: SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 'Post Office' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) FROM zip_data WHERE state = 'CA';

data.original_question: What are the zip code for the Senate house?
data.resolved_question: What are the zip codes for the US Senate representatives in the election database?
data.generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT county.Zip_code
FROM county
JOIN election ON county.County_Id = election.District
JOIN party ON election.Party = party.Party_ID
WHERE party.US_Senate IS NOT NULL;

data.original_question: Which city has the most bad aliases?
data.resolved_question: What is the city with the highest number of aliases that are considered 'bad' or 'unwanted', and how many aliases does it have?
data.generated_sql:
SELECT c.Name, COUNT(*) as alias_count
FROM city c
JOIN country co ON c.CountryCode = co.Code
WHERE c.Name = co.LocalName
GROUP BY c.Name
ORDER BY alias_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

data.original_question: List all the counties in Georgia.
data.resolved_question: List all the counties in Georgia.
data.generated_sql: SELECT County_name FROM county;

data.original_question: List all the locations of postal points with the area code "410".
data.resolved_question: List all the locations of postal points with the area code "410".
data.generated_sql:
SELECT zip_data.city, zip_data.state 
FROM area_code 
INNER JOIN zip_data ON area_code.zip_code = zip_data.zip_code 
WHERE area_code.area_code = '410';

data.original_question: What is the name of the CBSA of the city with the highest average house value?
data.resolved_question: What is the name of the CBSA of the city with the highest average house value?
data.generated_sql:
SELECT CBSA.CBSA_name
FROM zip_data
INNER JOIN CBSA ON zip_data.CBSA = CBSA.CBSA
ORDER BY zip_data.avg_house_value DESC
LIMIT 1;

data.original_question: What are the bad aliases of the postal points from East Setauket?
data.resolved_question: What are the bad aliases of the postal points from East Setauket?
data.generated_sql: SELECT avoid.bad_alias FROM avoid INNER JOIN zip_data ON avoid.zip_code = zip_data.zip_code WHERE zip_data.city = 'East Setauket'

data.original_question: What was the population of Wilcox County in 2010?
data.resolved_question: What was the population of Wilcox County in 2010?
data.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(zip_data.population_2010) FROM country JOIN zip_data ON country.zip_code = zip_data.zip_code WHERE country.county = 'WILCOX';

data.original_question: What is the code of the area with the largest Asian population?
data.resolved_question: What is the code of the area with the largest Asian population?
data.generated_sql: SELECT zip_code FROM zip_data ORDER BY asian_population DESC LIMIT 1;

data.original_question: List all the cities with micro CBSA.
data.resolved_question: List all the cities with micro CBSA.
data.generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT zip_data.city FROM zip_data INNER JOIN CBSA ON zip_data.CBSA = CBSA.CBSA WHERE CBSA.CBSA_type = 'Micro' AND zip_data.city IS NOT NULL;

data.original_question: What is the name of the state with the most counties?
data.resolved_question: What is the name of the state with the most counties?
data.generated_sql: SELECT state.name FROM country INNER JOIN state ON country.state = state.abbreviation GROUP BY state.name ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT country.county) DESC LIMIT 1;

data.original_question: What is the number of households in the "FL-10" district?
data.resolved_question: What is the number of households in the "FL-10" district?
data.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(zip_data.households) FROM zip_data INNER JOIN zip_congress ON zip_data.zip_code = zip_congress.zip_code INNER JOIN congress ON zip_congress.district = congress.cognress_rep_id WHERE congress.District = 'FL-10'

data.original_question: What is the average household income in the city known as "Danzig"?
data.resolved_question: What is the average household income in the city known as "Danzig" in the zip_data table of the address database?
data.generated_sql: SELECT AVG(zip_data.avg_income_per_household) FROM zip_data JOIN alias ON zip_data.zip_code = alias.zip_code WHERE alias.alias = 'Danzig'

data.original_question: What are the states with an above-average female population?
data.resolved_question: What are the states with an above-average female population?
data.generated_sql:
SELECT state.name AS state_name 
FROM zip_data 
JOIN state ON zip_data.state = state.abbreviation 
GROUP BY state.name 
HAVING SUM(zip_data.female_population) > (
    SELECT AVG(female_sum) 
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(zip_data.female_population) AS female_sum 
        FROM zip_data 
        JOIN state ON zip_data.state = state.abbreviation 
        GROUP BY state.name
    )
)

data.original_question: What percentage of households are in "Coroyell" out of its state?
data.resolved_question: What percentage of households in the state where "Coroyell" is located are in "Coroyell"?
data.generated_sql: SELECT ( (SELECT SUM(zip_data.households) FROM country JOIN zip_data ON country.zip_code = zip_data.zip_code WHERE country.county = 'Coroyell') * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(zip_data.households) FROM zip_data JOIN state ON zip_data.state = state.abbreviation WHERE state.name = (SELECT state.name FROM country JOIN state ON country.state = state.abbreviation WHERE country.county = 'Coroyell')) ) AS percentage;

data.original_question: What is the name and the position of the CBSA officer in the city of Cabo Rojo?
data.resolved_question: What is the name and the position of the CBSA officer in the city of Cabo Rojo, specifically in the CBSA that corresponds to the city of Cabo Rojo?
data.generated_sql: SELECT congress.first_name, congress.last_name, congress.House, congress.District FROM congress INNER JOIN zip_congress ON congress.cognress_rep_id = zip_congress.district INNER JOIN zip_data ON zip_congress.zip_code = zip_data.zip_code WHERE zip_data.city = 'Cabo Rojo'

data.original_question: Indicate the country name of the city Las Marias.
data.resolved_question: Indicate the country name of the city Las Marias.
data.generated_sql: SELECT Country.Name FROM City JOIN Country ON City.CountryCode = Country.Code WHERE City.Name = 'Las Marias';

data.original_question: How many cities does congressman Pierluisi Pedro represent?
data.resolved_question: How many cities does congressman Pierluisi Pedro represent?
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ct.district) FROM current c JOIN "current-terms" ct ON c.bioguide_id = ct.bioguide WHERE c.first_name = 'Pedro' AND c.last_name = 'Pierluisi'

data.original_question: Provide the names of bad aliases in the city of Aguadilla.
data.resolved_question: Provide the names of bad aliases in the city of Aguadilla.
data.generated_sql:
SELECT avoid.bad_alias
FROM avoid
JOIN zip_data ON avoid.zip_code = zip_data.zip_code
WHERE zip_data.city = 'Aguadilla';

data.original_question: Indicate the name of the congressman represent in Guanica.
data.resolved_question: Indicate the name of the congressman represent in Guanica.
data.generated_sql:
SELECT congress.first_name, congress.last_name
FROM congress
JOIN zip_congress ON congress.cognress_rep_id = zip_congress.district
JOIN zip_data ON zip_congress.zip_code = zip_data.zip_code
WHERE zip_data.city = 'Guanica';

data.original_question: Which state has the most bad aliases?
data.resolved_question: Which state has the most bad aliases?
data.generated_sql:
SELECT state.name AS state_name, COUNT(*) AS bad_alias_count
FROM avoid
JOIN zip_data ON avoid.zip_code = zip_data.zip_code
JOIN state ON zip_data.state = state.abbreviation
GROUP BY state.name
ORDER BY bad_alias_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

data.original_question: What is the difference in the number of bad alias between Aguada city and Aguadilla city?
data.resolved_question: What is the difference in the number of bad alias between Aguada city and Aguadilla city in the address database, specifically in the avoid table?

data.original_question: Which state has greater than 50 CBSA officers of metro type?
data.resolved_question: Which state has greater than 50 CBSA officers of metro type?
data.generated_sql: SELECT Name FROM county_public_safety WHERE Police_officers > 50;

data.original_question: Provide the population of Arecibo in 2020.
data.resolved_question: Provide the population of Arecibo in 2020.
data.generated_sql: SELECT population_2020 FROM zip_data WHERE city = 'Arecibo';

data.original_question: Indicate the name of the country with a population greater than 10000 in 2010.
data.resolved_question: Indicate the name of the country with a population greater than 10000 in 2010.
data.generated_sql: SELECT CountryName FROM Indicators WHERE IndicatorCode = 'SP.POP.TOTL' AND Year = 2010 AND Value > 10000;

data.original_question: Name the country with the largest number of households in a residential area.
data.resolved_question: Name the country with the largest number of households in a residential area.
data.generated_sql: SELECT country.county FROM country INNER JOIN zip_data ON country.zip_code = zip_data.zip_code GROUP BY country.county ORDER BY SUM(zip_data.households) DESC LIMIT 1;

data.original_question: Calculate the percentage of households in residential areas of countries over 10000.
data.resolved_question: What is the percentage of households in residential areas of countries with a population over 10,000?
data.generated_sql: SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN z.population_2020 > 10000 THEN z.households ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(z.households)) FROM zip_data z;

data.original_question: Among the types of postal points in Saint Croix, what percentage of postal points is the post office?
data.resolved_question: What percentage of postal points in Saint Croix are post offices?
data.generated_sql: SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 'Post Office' THEN zip_code END) * 100.0 / COUNT(zip_code)) FROM zip_data WHERE city = 'Saint Croix';

data.original_question: Among the area code 787, list the country of the cities with a postal point type of unique postal office.
data.resolved_question: Among the area code 787, list the country of the cities with a postal point type of unique postal office.
data.generated_sql: SELECT state.name FROM area_code JOIN zip_data ON area_code.zip_code = zip_data.zip_code JOIN country ON zip_data.zip_code = country.zip_code JOIN state ON country.state = state.abbreviation WHERE area_code.area_code = 787 AND zip_data.type = 'Unique Post Office'

data.original_question: What is the elevation of the city with the alias East Longmeadow?
data.resolved_question: What is the elevation of the city with the alias 'East Longmeadow' in the address database?
data.generated_sql: SELECT zd.elevation FROM alias a JOIN zip_data zd ON a.zip_code = zd.zip_code WHERE a.alias = 'East Longmeadow';

data.original_question: In cities that do not implement daylight savings, what is the total number of cities?
data.resolved_question: In cities that do not implement daylight savings, what is the total number of cities?
data.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT city) FROM zip_data WHERE daylight_savings = 'No';
